knowledge.description: Tests whether the guesser actually knows the drink
questions: Name one ingredient in this drink
What colour is it?
Is it served hot, cold, or room temperature?
What's the ABV — roughly?
Name the country it originates from
Is it a spirit, beer, wine, or cocktail?
Name one brand that makes this drink
What glass is it traditionally served in?
Name one mixer that goes well with it
Is it sweet, bitter, sour, or dry?
Is it carbonated or still?
Name one food it pairs well with
Is it typically drunk as a shot, sip, or pint?
What colour is the liquid — be specific
Does it contain fruit?
Is it aged in barrels?
Name one cocktail this drink is commonly found in
What season is this drink most associated with?
Is it fermented, distilled, or brewed?
Name a famous region or city associated with this drink
Does it have any foam when poured?
Is this drink typically consumed before, during, or after a meal?
Can you name a celebrity or famous person associated with this drink?
What is the most popular way to serve this drink?
Name one thing people often garnish this drink with

group.description: Turns the spotlight on your mates
questions: Who in the group has definitely had this before?
Who in the group likes this drink the most?
Which two people in the group would order this on a night out?
Who in the group would never touch this drink?
Who would drink this before a night out to pregame?
Who in the group could name the most facts about this drink right now?
If this drink was a person in the group, who would it be?
Who in the group has had the worst night because of this drink?
Who in the group would order this at a wedding?
Who would be most likely to bring this to a house party?
Who would lie and say they like this drink just to look cool?
Who in the group introduced someone else to this drink?
Who has definitely never heard of this drink before tonight?
Who in the group would drink this alone on a Tuesday night?
Who would order a double of this without flinching?
Who in the group would post a photo of this on Instagram?
Who would try and make a cocktail out of this and fail?
Who in the group would drink this at a work do?
Who in the group is most likely to have a story involving this drink?
Who would drink this straight from the bottle given the chance?

quirky.description: Abstract and funny questions that reveal the vibe without giving it away
questions: If this drink was a local pub, which one would it be?
If this drink was a song, what genre would it be?
What time of day is this drink's whole personality?
If this drink had a catchphrase, what would it be?
What kind of person orders this at the bar?
If this drink was a film, what age rating would it get?
Would this drink start a fight or end one?
If this drink was a holiday destination, where would it be?
What's this drink's energy — aperitif energy or 3am energy?
What career does this drink have?
If this drink was a weather forecast, what would it be?
What kind of car does this drink drive?
If this drink was a TV show, what genre would it be?
What decade does this drink belong in?
Is this drink a main character or a side character?
If this drink had a dress code, what would it be?
What's this drink's go-to karaoke song?
If this drink was a teacher, what subject would they teach?
What sporting event would this drink watch?
Is this drink a morning person or a night owl?
If this drink was a takeaway, what would it be?
What social media platform does this drink use most?
If this drink was a type of music festival, which one would it be?
What would this drink's Tinder bio say?
If this drink could only be consumed in one specific place forever, where would it be?
What emoji best represents this drink?
If this drink was a board game, which one would it be?
Would this drink be more comfortable in a castle or a caravan?
What's this drink's villain origin story?
If this drink was a smell, what would it be?

story.description: Gets the group reminiscing and sharing memories
questions: Has anyone here had a bad night because of this drink?
Where's the most unusual place someone has had this drink?
What's the strangest thing you've ever mixed this with?
When was the first time anyone here tried this?
Has anyone smuggled this drink somewhere they shouldn't have?
What's the earliest in the day anyone has had this drink?
Has this drink ever got anyone in trouble?
What's the worst hangover anyone has had from this drink?
Has anyone ever been bought this drink by a stranger?
What's the most this drink has ever cost someone?
Has anyone drunk this drink in a country it originates from?
What's the most unusual person you've seen drinking this?
Has this drink ever led to a night you couldn't remember?
What's the most dramatic reaction anyone has seen to this drink?
Has anyone cried while drinking this drink?
What's the most impressive thing someone has done after drinking this?
Has anyone been dared to drink this in an unusual way?
Has this drink ever caused a falling out in the group?
What's the best night anyone has had that started with this drink?
Has anyone ever been caught drinking this somewhere they shouldn't have?

tactical.description: Designed to make the guesser sweat before their decision
questions: On a scale of 1–10, how confident are you that you know what this drink is?
Name two drinks it could be — you have to pick from those two
If you had to bet a round of drinks on your guess, would you?
What's the one thing you're most unsure about with this drink?
What drink do you think it definitely isn't?
If you're wrong, what drink would you have guessed instead?
Are you leaning leave or steal right now — before the last question?
What one extra clue would make you certain?
How many drinks do you think are in the running right now?
If you had to steal or leave right now, which would you pick?
